name: Biome flag fix - verify no regression

description: Fixed Biome flag: --output-format=json → --reporter=json in biome-check runner and updated test

asi.hypothesis: The --output-format flag was invalid for 'biome check' command (only valid for 'biome format'). Changed to --reporter=json which is the correct flag for check command.
asi.validation: All 499 tests pass including 131 dispatch tests
asi.biome_issue: Biome CLI uses different output flags: --reporter for check/lint, --output-format for format

description: Made tool availability checks async and consistent across prettier, biome, ast-grep, and ruff

asi.hypothesis: ensureAvailable() methods in ruff-client, biome-client, and sg-runner were using safeSpawn (spawnSync) which blocks the event loop. Changed to safeSpawnAsync for true non-blocking behavior. Also made probePrettierInstall fire-and-forget consistent with other patterns.
asi.pattern: All tool probes now use async spawn + fire-and-forget pattern consistently
